name: 03_02_bb_rsi_mean_reversion_us500_m5
hypothesis: On US500 M5, short-horizon BB+RSI extremes during the 13:00-20:00 UTC US session revert within 24 bars, offering a positive-expectancy scalp when volatility is neither dead nor panicked.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_bb AND rsi(7) < 15 AND bb_width_percentile(300) > 25 AND session_mask==1
entry_rules.short: close > upper_bb AND rsi(7) > 85 AND bb_width_percentile(300) > 25 AND session_mask==1

exit_rules.breakeven: move SL to entry after price reaches 0.8*ATR in favor

notes: Same family as candidate 1 but different symbol/TF/session to test portability.
